While ultra-active intraday traders might hit a ceiling with its feature set, its unmatched ease of use, transparent pricing, and zero-AMC model make it a premier financial application in the market today.

Indmoney is a far better app than this they never do such things.

I bought an Aye Finance Ltd bond through Groww, but my payout has not been credited. Despite investing through their platform, Groww has refused to help and said I must deal directly with the RTA, offering no support. This kind of response is very concerning for investors. People invest their hard-earned money expecting basic assistance when issues arise, but there is no support when it is actually needed. I would strongly advise others to be careful before relying on this platform 4 investment

I have had a very good experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and other financial products easy, even for beginners. Account opening was smooth, transactions are fast, and the interface is clean and intuitive. Overall, Groww is a reliable platform for anyone looking to start or grow their investment journey. Highly recommend
